title: Swiss Grid Generator Quick Start
description: Quick-start manual with specimen pages for every bundled font.
author: Swiss Grid Generator

textContent.cover-intro: This file is a short guided project. Load it through the header to review the workflow inside the live layout engine.
textContent.cover-step-1:
1. Define the page system.
Ratio, baseline, margins, modules.
textContent.cover-step-2:
2. Add and refine content.
Text, image, drag, edit, reflow.
textContent.cover-step-3:
3. Save or export the result.
Project JSON, PDF, SVG, IDML.
textContent.cover-caption: Open the Project panel to move through the pages.

textContent.system-subhead: Set structure first. The content field and the baseline grid define the whole composition.
textContent.system-a: Canvas Ratio sets format, orientation, and rotation. Start here.
textContent.system-b: Baseline Grid sets the vertical rhythm. Keep it stable.
textContent.system-c: Margins define the printable field. Use a method or custom values.
textContent.system-d: Grid & Rhythm sets columns, rows, gutter, and module cadence.
textContent.system-e: Typo defines hierarchy and base font. Untouched blocks inherit it.
textContent.system-f: Color Scheme sets the page background and new placeholder colors.
textContent.system-caption: Recommended order: Ratio -> Baseline -> Margins -> Grid -> Typo -> Color.

textContent.workflow-subhead: The preview is canvas-rendered. The same calculated layout drives export, so screen and output stay aligned.
textContent.workflow-a: Double-click an empty module to add text. Shift + double-click adds an image placeholder.
textContent.workflow-b: Hover a block to edit it. Drag to reposition it. Alt/Option + drag duplicates it.
textContent.workflow-c: Use the left sidebar editor for geometry, type, color, reflow, rotation, and delete.
textContent.workflow-d: Header toggles let you inspect baselines, margins, modules, typography, and placeholders.
textContent.workflow-e: Save Project JSON stores pages, settings, layers, and logical block positions.
textContent.workflow-f: Export creates vector PDF, SVG, or IDML from the same layout calculation.
textContent.workflow-caption: Shortcuts: Cmd/Ctrl+O load, Cmd/Ctrl+S save, Cmd/Ctrl+Z undo.

textContent.paragraph-262daa7c-7543-42bf-83eb-6d3ae0: The modular grid allows designers to organize content with clarity and purpose. All typography aligns to the baseline grid, ensuring harmony across the page. Modular proportions guide contrast and emphasis while preserving coherence across complex layouts. Structure becomes a tool for expression rather than a constraint, enabling flexible yet unified systems.
textContent.paragraph-870d1f8d-d33a-4409-9ad2-de5745: Based on Müller-Brockmann's Book Grid Systems in Graphic Design (1981). Copyleft & -right 2026 by lp45.net
textContent.paragraph-37eb7649-41f0-4764-9160-717026: A grid creates coherent visual structure and establishes a consistent spatial rhythm
